title: esops-doctor profile
description: Shape of a scan profile YAML — applies rule selection and severity overrides on top of the catalog. Used by the embedded profiles, --profile-file, and the `new-profile` scaffolder.

name.description: Profile name. Referenced by --profile and printed in logs.

description.description: One-line description shown alongside the profile name.

severity_overrides.description: Rule-ID to severity rewrites applied after catalog load. Unknown rule IDs warn but do not fail the scan.

skip_tags.description: Drop rules carrying any of these tags. Skip-tags win over include-tags so a profile can subtract from a tag-narrowed selection.

include_tags.description: Keep only rules carrying at least one of these tags. Empty = no constraint.

rule_ids.description: Keep only rules whose canonical id appears in this list. Empty = no constraint.
